title: Bootstrap AO Foundry v0.1 from the AO Forge one-shot kit
objective: Create the first public-safe AO Foundry SDD package, contracts, examples, minimal Go CLI, and verification evidence.

required_delegations.reason: AO Forge owns governed single-run planning, gating, execution, and packet evidence.

acceptance: README explains Foundry as the operations factory above Forge
design, contracts, examples, runbook, CLI, and tests are present
CLI validates valid examples and rejects malformed registry and task records
public files avoid local paths, credential-like strings, and non-public coordination notes
